text.title: 30 Day Post Launch Review Template Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every 30 Day Post Launch Review Template application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Report MUST carry a per-channel funnel snapshot (acquire / activate / retain / revenue counts) at T+30; aggregated 'total funnel' rejected.
rule.rationale: Per-channel reveals which launch channel actually performed.

rule.statement: Every pre-launch hypothesis MUST receive verdict {confirmed | refuted | inconclusive} with evidence; un-verdicted hypotheses are rejected.
rule.rationale: Without verdicts the operator carries unfalsifiable folklore into next launch.

rule.statement: Report MUST list ≥3 ranked next-bets with budget allocation; single-bet retros are rejected.
rule.rationale: Single-bet retros = confirmation bias on the obvious follow-on.

rule.statement: Each next-bet MUST carry an explicit budget (USD + hours); next-bets without budget are rejected.
rule.rationale: Budgetless bets compete by enthusiasm, not opportunity-cost.

rule.statement: Each report MUST carry version + last_reviewed + cite pre-launch hypotheses by id.
